arts.ttl: Charlton Athletic v Leyton Orient: League One playoff final – live
arts.sum: League One playoff final at Wembley, 1.01pm BST kick-off Joy for Sunderland | Walsall’s rollercoaster | Email Taha “That was the music I was brought up on. My dad loved Eric Clapton, Queen, Michael Jackson, so I was educated from there. I grew up in the 80s, probably the best era for bands and I caught the tail end of the Haçienda and indie era, which led into the 90s. I used to do a bit of DJing when I was a kid, when I was [a player] at Brighton, house music. I wasn’t any good but I had my decks and I love my music.” Ben Fisher and Nathan Jones talked football, too. Continue reading...
